==Tier 1 (White)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" |[[File:TimeFrag.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" |Time Frag
|3x3||Enhancment Injection:<br>Snail HP +200<br>Snail DEF +20
| rowspan="8" | B-Tads +100
|-
|2x3||Time Rift INTEL + 5000
|-
|3x3||B-tads 20k
|-
|4x3||Novice Scroll x10
|-
|5x3||W-tads x200
|-
|6x1||[[Gear|Broken Second Hand]]
|-
|7x1||[[Gear|Broken Minute Hand]]
|-
|8x1||[[Gear|Broken Hour Hand]]
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:TimeFrag46bBC.png|75x75px]]
| Time Frag 4.6b BC||4x3||Tool Chest x100||B-Tads +800
|-
| style="background-color:#9c9c9c;" | [[File:TimeFrag4mBC.png|75x75px]]
| Time Frag 4m BC||4x3||Fungus Chest x100||Time Rift INTEL +1500
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:TimeFragGreen.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Time Frag
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
| rowspan="8" | B-tads +300
|-
|2x3||Time Rift INTEL +10K
|-
|3x3||40k B-tads
|-
|4x3||Novice Scroll x20
|-
|5x3||Coating (Green) x20
|-
|6x3||Organ Slime x50
|-
|7x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#40da25;">Time Cog</span>]]
|-
|8x3||Refine Speedup x10h
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:TimeFrag3500BC.png|75x75px]]
|Time Frag 3500 BC||4x3||Gear Chest x100|| Offering Speedup +25m
|-
| style="background-color:#7de87f;" | [[File:TimeFragAD1621.png|75x75px]]
|Time Frag AD 1621||4x3||Evolution Chest x100|| Gene Speedup +25m
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:TimeFragBlue.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Time Frag
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +220<br>Snail DEF +22
| rowspan="8" | B-Tads +900
|-
|2x3||Time Rift INTEL +15k
|-
|3x3||60k B-tads
|-
|4x3||Expert Scroll x20
|-
|5x3||Offering Speedup x5h
|-
|6x3||Rift Treasure Map x50
|-
|7x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Time Blade</span>]]
|-
|8x3||Lottery Ticket x3
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:TimeFragAD1914.png|75x75px]]
|Time Frag AD 1914||4x3||Organ Chest x100||Gear Chest +10
|-
| style="background-color:#7de8e6;" | [[File:TimeFragAD1945.png|75x75px]]
|Time Frag AD 1945||4x3||Soul Chest x100||Fungus Chest +10
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:TimeFragPurple.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Time Frag
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail ATK +24<br>Snail DEF +24
| rowspan="8" | B-Tads +2700
|-
|2x3||Time Rift INTEL +20k
|-
|3x3||80k B-tads
|-
|4x3||Master Scroll x20
|-
|5x3||W-Tad x400
|-
|6x3||Dragon Chest x100
|-
|7x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--purple-text)">Time Flute</span>]]
|-
|8x3||Lottery Ticket x5
|-
|style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:TimeFragAD2008.png|75x75px]]
|Time Frag AD 2008||4x3||Wish Coin x1||Purple Reagent +5
|-
| style="background-color:#f3b5e1;" | [[File:TimeFragAD2020.png|75x75px]]
|Time Frag AD 2020||4x3||[[The Bell of St Mura]] x20 ||Rift Treasure Map +2
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:TimeFragOrange.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Time Frag
|3x3||Enhancement Injection:<br>Snail HP +260<br>Snail ATK +26
| rowspan="8" | B-Tads +8100 
|-
|2x3||Time Rift INTEL +25k
|-
|3x3||100k B-tad
|-
|4x3||Glue x50
|-
|5x3||Golden Pickaxe x3
|-
|6x3||Orange Reagent x10
|-
|7x3||Incense
|-
|8x3||Lotto Ticket x10
|-
| rowspan="2" style="background-color:#ffb066;" | [[File:TimeFragAD2120.png|75x75px]]
| rowspan="2" | Time Frag
|3x4||Grandmaster Scroll x20
| rowspan="2" | W-tad +75
|-
|4x3||Relic RF x20
|-
|}
